figure.title: UALink Pod Management Interfaces
figure.purpose: Shows the overarching management architecture and connectivity for a UALink Pod.

technical_summary: A central 'UALink Pod Controller' manages the entire Pod via REST API/GUI.
It connects to the components using three distinct management networks:
1. System Node Management Interface (red): Connects to the NICs of System Nodes.
2. Switch Management Interface (purple): Connects to the Switch Mgmt Agents on the Switch Platforms.
3. Out-of-Band Management Interface (green): Connects to the BMCs on all System Nodes and Switch Platforms.

components.name: UALink Pod Controller
components.description: Central orchestration unit for Initialization, Fault Mgmt, Workload Mgmt, vPod Mgmt, and Telemetry.

interfaces.name: System Node Management Interface
interfaces.description: In-band/side-band network for node OS/software management.

interfaces.name: Switch Management Interface
interfaces.description: Network dedicated to switch fabric configuration.

critical_facts: The Pod Controller orchestrates complex multi-node and multi-switch topologies using separate, dedicated management networks for hardware, switches, and host systems.
